# Instructions

## Instruction source of truth

- General operating rules are maintained in the external SSOT:
  <https://github.com/shlomoa/shlomoa/blob/main/.github/copilot-instructions.md>.
- Repository-wide AI guidance lives in [`../AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md).
- This file is Copilot-specific bootstrap only. Do not copy common guidance here; update
  `../AGENTS.md` or the external general-instructions SSOT instead.

## Copilot bootstrap

- Read and apply the external general instructions before applying repository-specific guidance.
- Read and apply [`../AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md) for repository-specific rules, key sources, and
  validation expectations.
- If instructions conflict, prefer the more specific repository guidance unless a higher-priority
  system, developer, or safety instruction requires otherwise.
